Known Constraints / Notes

* Pipeline execution may require manual approval depending on the configured Azure DevOps environment gates.
* Azure resource visibility depends on the required SailPoint/entitlement access being granted.
* Proxy/noProxy values must be correct per environment to avoid access issues during Terraform execution or Function App runtime access.
* Full DIA runtime file-processing validation in Test/UAT may require Cloud team support because DIA input blob/container access and test file upload setup are restricted.
* Dev runtime validation was previously possible using Blob Storage because SMTP/source integration was not yet available.
* Even with Owner/PIM access, blob upload or container creation may still be blocked by storage, network, or security policies.
* Any future apply-stage issue should be fixed through a user branch, validated up to plan where possible, then merged back through the standard process.


Current Follow-up / Turnover Notes

* Keep this page updated with final deployment evidence and validation notes.
* Record any remaining Test/UAT runtime validation constraints separately from deployment completion.
* No further infrastructure deployment blocker is currently identified from the latest merged-branch run.
